title: Evidence
description: A verifiable observation or source. Field names here match the actual EvidenceCommitted runtime payload (src/cli.js evidenceCommit, src/validator.js validateEvidenceCommitted), not the older snake_case shape (title/summary/source_type/source_url/category/credibility_score) this file previously described. See the schemas/v0-vs-runtime sync item before treating any sibling file in this directory as ground truth.
